title: keteleeria sacra
intro: Keteleeria sacra, also known as the Chinese nut pine or sacred fir, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Keteleeria sacra include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
